overall.description: A smooth camera movement through a futuristic cyberpunk city environment, starting from an outdoor plaza, entering a modern glass building with indoor trees, ascending via escalator to an upper level overlooking a neon-lit street, and ending in a narrow interior corridor. The footage is from a video game engine with high-quality neon lighting and reflective surfaces.

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through an open urban plaza at night, passing large white concrete blocks and approaching a modern glass building with prominent NIGHT CITY signage. Digital billboards illuminate the left side as the camera ascends the exterior stairs toward the entrance.

segments.scene_description: Inside the building lobby, the camera moves past large pine trees in hexagonal planters set on glossy black reflective flooring. The space features glass walls and the camera approaches an escalator visible in the distance.

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the escalator through a multi-level interior space, with glass railings on the right and views of the neon-lit city becoming visible through windows on the left. The movement reveals upper floors and the building's vertical architecture.

segments.scene_description: On the upper walkway, the camera moves along a railing overlooking a busy city street with moving traffic and bright neon billboards. A cat sits on the nearby ledge, stands up, and walks away as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow interior corridor with glass walls

agents.ego_description: walking through narrow corridor after the cat moves away

glass wall sections reflecting neon lights

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a narrow, dimly lit corridor with glass walls reflecting distant neon glow. The space is enclosed and quiet, contrasting with the open city views of the previous segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark, open urban plaza into the luminous, multi-level interior of a futuristic corporate building. It begins by gliding past large white concrete blocks and digital billboards at night, ascending exterior stairs toward a glass entrance marked by prominent Night City signage. As the camera crosses the threshold, the environment shifts to a glossy lobby where the view opens up to reveal large pine trees in hexagonal planters reflected on polished black flooring. The movement then flows toward a distant escalator, ascending through the vertical architecture of the building while glass railings frame the climb. Finally, the perspective expands as the camera rises, revealing the sprawling neon-lit city through expansive windows on the left.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, vibrant city overlook into the quiet confinement of a narrow interior corridor. It begins on an upper walkway, gliding along a railing that reveals a bustling street filled with moving traffic and glowing neon billboards. As the camera approaches a cat perched on the ledge, the animal stands and walks away, guiding the perspective forward. The scene then shifts abruptly as the camera leaves the open air and enters a dimly lit hallway with glass walls. This enclosed space replaces the city's noise with a hushed atmosphere, where the only light is the distant neon glow reflecting off the polished surfaces.
